subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Him Who hath named Himself, in one station, the Mother Book, and in another station, the Mother of the Bayán and the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی سمی نفسه فی مقام بام الکتاب و فی مقام آخر بام البیان و القلم الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Declaration; advent of the Bab
